Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Red River to Rio Bravo, outlaws and legends collide in some of the greatest Westerns ever made.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These Western classics capture a fading frontier, where aging outlaws and a changing world bring the Wild West to its final reckoning.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Dollars to Django and beyond, Italian westerns captured the frontier with style, scale, and unforgettable antiheroes.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These Hollywood Westerns looked beyond legend, showing audiences the harsh reality of frontier conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From sharp satire to offbeat stories, these Westerns put a fresh spin on Hollywood's wildest frontier.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bold and seductive. Provocative and iconic. These boundary-pushing movies live on the edge.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Journey back to the 1950s and 60s, where science and imagination brought forth a new wave of classic films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Monsters, aliens, mutants, and more! Who will save us from cinema's most terrifying atomic-era creatures?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: It's a wild blast from the past, as atomic monsters, aliens, and more invade your living room!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the depths of space (and deeper), comes an all-new collection of intergalactic invaders and futuristic fears!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Loyalty, vengeance, and justice collide in these Western hits starring Glenn Ford, Steve McQueen, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Blending classic Western roots with modern storytelling, these films reveal a frontier that never ends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Modern Outlaws and Ghosts of the West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step into the world of horror and sci-fi master John Carpenter with this spine-tingling look at some of his most celebrated films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Humanity faces its greatest threat as the monstrous lizard Barugon is unleashed in Japan. It’s up to Gamera to find his way back to Earth and save the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From frozen fights to winter warfare, it's a blizzard of bone-chilling big screen action hits!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look at the bizarre body horror and sci-fi films of director David Cronenberg.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Aliens and Androids have taken a “Fantastic Voyage” to Earth, and now we are all in “Altered States!”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 1

Video.summary: “Invaders from Mars” have landed, hired ‘Robocop,” and are all now driving cross-country with “Speed Racer”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 2

Video.summary: From the past to the future, laying down the law comes easy to these big screen cops!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A gunman (Jack Palance) makes a fatal mistake when he and his gang ravage a town and murder the local priest (Lee Van Cleef). Now, the priest’s twin brother vows revenge, and teams with a local boy (Leif Garrett) to bring the gunman and his gang to their knees. Lee Van Cleef played dual roles in this 1977 Spaghetti Western produced by Golan-Globus Productions.
Video.title: God's Gun

Video.summary: John Phillip Law and Lee Van Cleef aren’t friends, but they’ll find they have something in common when they both set out to hunt down a gang of vicious outlaws in the Wild West. Directed by Giulio Petroni, this 1967 Spaghetti Western features a musical score by the legendary Ennio Morricone.
Video.title: Death Rides a Horse

Video.summary: In this TFH exclusive, director Allan Arkush takes you inside cult classic The Final Comedown (a.k.a. Blast).
Video.title: The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush

Image.alt: The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush
The Final Comedown with Allan Arkush

Video.summary: Jane Russell sizzles on screen as Rio McDonald, a woman caught in the paths of Wild West legends Billy the Kid, Doc Holliday, and Pat Garrett. This 1943 blockbuster, directed by Howard Hughes, was famously controversial for its depiction of Russell, who became a sex symbol after its release.
Video.title: Episode 1
